entities.name: VILLAGE LEVEL STUDIES
entities.description: A longitudinal household data set and study framework generated by ICRISAT from 1975 to present providing insights on village dynamics

entities.name: VILLAGE DYNAMICS
entities.description: The multiple aspects and changes occurring within village settings

entities.name: LEARNER PARTICIPANTS
entities.description: Researchers who utilized VLS data, received training, exposure to base villages, and research supervision

entities.name: VILLAGE ECONOMIES
entities.description: The economic systems of villages analyzed through longitudinal panel data

entities.name: DEVELOPMENT THEORIES
entities.description: Theories regarding development that were confirmed through the analysis of VLS data

entities.name: POLICIES
entities.description: Recommendations made based on the analysis of VLS data

entities.name: TECHNOLOGIES
entities.description: New developments created to suit semi-arid tropics based on VLS insights

entities.name: SEMI-ARID TROPICS
entities.description: The specific geographic and climatic region for which technologies were developed

entities.name: CAPACITY BUILDING
entities.description: The process of enhancing individual and institutional capacity of scholars

entities.name: QUALITATIVE AND QUANTITATIVE METHODS
entities.description: Robust methodology encompassing both types of data collection and analysis used in the study

entities.name: TRACER STUDY
entities.description: A study designed to track learner participants through a comprehensive survey using online and offline tools

entities.name: ACIAR FRAMEWORKS AND GUIDELINES
entities.description: Frameworks and guidelines used to provide insights for the tracer study

entities.name: CASE STUDIES
entities.description: Supplemental method used to capture the impact of VLS training on human scientific capacity

entities.name: HUMAN SCIENTIFIC CAPACITY
entities.description: The scientific ability and expertise of individuals enhanced through training and research
